overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective from a flying vehicle navigating through Night City during a heavy rainstorm at night. The vehicle weaves between towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage, transitioning from high-altitude flight to tight corridor navigation between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle begins gradual descent from high altitude toward street level
passes under overhead transit bridge structure

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through dense urban canyon of skyscrapers while descending

notable_agents.action: distant flying vehicle traveling in same direction ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage with red and white text
elevated monorail or transit structure spanning between buildings
floating holographic advertisement with purple and pink hues
tall modern building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-altitude flight through a dense cyberpunk cityscape at night during heavy rain. The vehicle descends gradually while passing under transit infrastructure, with neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminating the scene. Sparse flying traffic is visible ahead as the camera navigates between towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange with industrial piping

events.description: transitions from commercial district to industrial area with exposed piping
vehicle banks sharply right to follow highway curvature

agents.ego_description: navigating through elevated highway infrastructure and industrial zones while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure passing overhead
large cylindrical ventilation pipes emitting steam
covered market stalls and vendor canopies visible at street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies through a semi-covered industrial zone characterized by concrete overpasses and large exhaust pipes. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and shadow as the camera passes under infrastructure. Street-level markets become visible below as the vehicle banks right to follow the highway curvature.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower altitude urban streets with hotel district

events.description: passes above street-level traffic and illuminated market stalls
rain intensity increases creating heavier atmospheric haze

agents.ego_description: flying low over city streets while approaching the hotel district with dense neon signage

notable_agents.action: other flying vehicle navigating through the same corridor ahead

entered.detail: tall building with prominent blue neon sign reading HOテル
rounded structure covered in digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: Flying at lower altitude over city streets, the scene reveals the HOテル building ahead with its distinctive blue neon signage. The vehicle passes above street traffic and market stalls while other flying vehicles navigate the same airspace. Rain intensifies, creating atmospheric haze around the cylindrical advertising towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense skyscraper corridor with Japanese signage

events.description: enters extremely narrow corridor between towering buildings
passes through intense red neon light cast by building signage

agents.ego_description: threading carefully through narrow gaps between skyscrapers covered in dense digital billboards

entered.detail: intense red neon lighting along building edges
tall vertical screen showing animated advertisements
bright green illuminated corporate logo on building facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon between towering buildings, with the HOテル sign now prominently visible ahead. Bright red and green neon signs illuminate the tight corridor as the camera maneuvers through the confined space. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed with vertical holographic displays covering the building walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: extremely tight building corridor with bright neon advertisements

events.description: passes extremely close to building facade with large green neon sign
vehicle slows and banks left to navigate tight corner between buildings

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering through the tightest sections of the urban canyon near hotel district

entered.detail: building facade passing within close proximity to vehicle
long vertical neon light running down building edge

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the vehicle navigates the most confined spaces of the city, passing extremely close to building walls covered in bright green neon signage. The HOテル sign falls behind as the camera banks left through a narrow alleyway. Vertical neon strips and structural beams fill the frame as the vehicle slows to navigate the tight corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from the high-altitude heights of a neon-lit metropolis into the gritty, industrial corridors of the lower city. It begins by gliding through a dense cityscape during a heavy rainstorm, passing beneath transit infrastructure and towering glass buildings illuminated by holographic advertisements. As the vehicle descends, the open skyline narrows, and the camera navigates through a semi-covered industrial zone defined by concrete overpasses and massive exhaust pipes. The lighting shifts from the bright glow of skyscrapers to a moody mix of neon and shadow before the vehicle banks right to follow the curvature of a highway. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal bustling street-level markets far below as the flight path settles into the urban depths.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a rain-slicked metropolis that transitions from open city streets into an increasingly claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins at a lower altitude gliding over street traffic and market stalls, where the blue neon signage of the HOテル building emerges through an intensifying atmospheric haze. As the vehicle pushes forward, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor between towering skyscrapers, with the environment becoming more enclosed as bright red and green neon signs and vertical holographic displays line the walls. The camera then banks left, leaving the HOテル sign behind to navigate the most confined spaces of the city. Finally, the flight slows as it weaves through a tight alleyway filled with structural beams and vivid green neon strips that crowd the frame.
